instruction: Write an email to a key customer summarizing their account usage this quarter.

constraints.framing: open with appreciation for the partnership

feedback_rounds: Mention the number of reports generated and invite them to a quarterly review call.
rationale_hint: Warm customer email; feedback adds reports figure + a call invite.

provenance.source_benchmark: WONDERBREAD SOP Generation / SOP Improvement (Wornow et al., 2024); TheAgentCompany report drafting (Xu et al., 2024)
provenance.adaptation: Author-constructed table, brief, and constraints over synthetic figures; data-to-text drafting with scripted feedback follows the SOP-generation/improvement and report-drafting pattern of the cited benchmarks. No benchmark text or data is reproduced. Sub-class: customer_email.
provenance.license: Original work by the author (tables, briefs, constraints, judge rubric); benchmark semantics reference only
